issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttack' (opponent's attack), not 'OnAttacked' (when your card is attacked)
Target scope should be 'ChooseOpponentCharacterOrLeader' (rest opponent's cards), not 'ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader' (rest your own cards)

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Your Opponent's Attack] [Once Per Turn] ➀ (You may rest the specified number of DON!! cards in your cost area.): Rest up to 1 of your opponent's Leader or Character cards.
